name: kucun-desktop
description: 本地库存出入库管理桌面系统

scripts.dev: pnpm rebuild:electron && concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.rebuild:node: cross-env npm_config_cache=.cache/npm npm_config_devdir=.cache/node-gyp pnpm rebuild better-sqlite3
scripts.rebuild:electron: cross-env npm_config_cache=.cache/npm npm_config_devdir=.cache/node-gyp electron_config_cache=.cache/electron electron-builder install-app-deps
scripts.package:win: pnpm build && pnpm rebuild:electron && cross-env ELECTRON_CACHE=.cache/electron ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache/electron-builder electron-builder --win
